summary.en: Nickel created simple low-cost bank accounts through tobacconists and retail points, serving excluded or underserved customers without the complexity of traditional branch banking.
summary.zh: Nickel 通过烟草店等零售网点提供简单低成本账户，服务被传统银行忽视或排斥的人群，避开传统网点银行复杂度。

sources.label: BNP Paribas and Nickel public acquisition information
